author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Root cause of GPU slowness: attention does 144+ PCIe roundtrips per token (data_vec to CPU for head splitting, causal masking, scale, and result extraction — per head × per layer × per token). Fix: (1) precompute causal mask and scale tensors on GPU once, reuse them, (2) pull Q/K/V once and push head slices to GPU once, (3) keep matmul/softmax/dropout/mask on GPU via tensor ops, (4) pull results once at the end.
